sections.heading: 2. In these Regulations, unless the context otherwise requires Interpretation
sections.text:
“Commissioner-General” means the Commissioner General
appointed under the Zambia Revenue Authority Act; and Cap. 321
“remittance service provider” includes a bank, mobile money
operator, financial technology application provider, digital
wallet provider, money transfer operator or any other
similar service provider used for the purposes of remitting
funds.

(2) The tax on the return referred to under subregulation (1)
shall be payable within fourteen days after the end of the month in
which the transaction was made.
Repeal of SI 5. The Income Tax (Advance Income Tax) Regulations, 2024
No. 96 of are repealed.
